title: FIFA WORLD CUP | JORDAN vs. ALGERIA - Levi's® Stadium
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Heading to the stadium for FIFA World Cup 2026™ this summer? Please refer to the event’s website here.

Jordan vs. Algeria will take place at Levi’s® Stadium on June 22nd, 2026 at 8:00 p.m. PT.

For this summer’s FIFA World Cup 2026™ tournament, please refer to FIFAWorldCup.com for the latest policies and stadium information.
